title: Modify Public Swords
description: This plugin is to replicate the 4 different swords that are in modify public server
body:
ModifySwords is a Minecraft plugin that introduces custom swords with unique abilities. Players can obtain powerful swords such as the Strike Sword (chance to strike lightning), Dash Sword (allows dashing through the air), Executioner Sword (chance to drop the head of a slain player), and Void Sword (chance to blind enemies). These swords are fully customizable by modifying their lore, giving players endless possibilities for powerful and unique gear.

**COMMANDS**
- /modifyswords get strike --> (to recieve the strike sword)
- /modifyswords get dash --> (recieve the dash sword)
- /modifyswords get executioner --> (to recieve the executioner's sword)
- /modifyswords get void --> (to recieve the void sword)
- /modify ability <-- (this command doesn't work currently so to activate the dash sword you may only use shift + right click for now. Will fix soon)
